title: THE LENNY HENRY SHOW
overview: Sitcom based around the character of wide-boy Brixton pirate radio DJ - the "crucialll!!!" Delbert Wilkins, founder of the BBC (Brixton Broadcasting Corporation).  It focus on Delbert's attempts to break into the big time.

episodes.title: Sonny Sidles Up
episodes.overview: He may be Brixton's 'Prince of Cool', but how will pirate broadcaster, style-counsellor and fashion model Delbert Wilkins handle the hot potato of an unexpected intrusion into his private life?
